nodes.name: force-rule dimension is an independent confound from step-index

meta.rule: When reporting a force-commit ablation, separate the force_rule (argmax / sampled / prophet-thresh) dimension onto its own axis. At the same t*, results can flip with the rule.
meta.why: diffusion-llm-step iter1 on GSM8K (n=50) at t*=0.5T: argmax drops -24pt, prophet@0.9 gains +2pt. The PLAN H1 '<=2pt drop' prediction applies to prophet-style only; argmax is a separate mechanism.
meta.when: Writing any force-commit or early-commit family ablation report — failing to expose the rule as a table axis flips the mechanism conclusion.
